description: Strong adoption opportunity with articulated decisions, high financial gravity, and immediate impact

decision_density.rationale: L4s have specific decision_articulation with quantifiable triggers composing into coherent planning sequence

financial_gravity.rationale: Majority HIGH financial ratings with FIRST-order impact on production throughput

impact_proximity.rationale: Capacity decisions directly affect production scheduling; value visible within weeks

confidence_signal.rationale: Most L4s have MEDIUM rating_confidence; some uncertainty in constraint modeling

anti_patterns: decision_density should NOT be 3 unless >75% of L4s have specific trigger-action-outcome chains
confidence_signal should NOT be 3 — there is genuine uncertainty in constraint modeling
